items.title: Slot unsure if Salah has played last Liverpool game
items.summary: Arne Slot has said Liverpool must wait to discover whether Mohamed Salah has played his last game for the club after he was forced off with an injury in Saturday's 3-1 victory over Crystal Palace.

items.title: González screamer puts Man City in FA Cup final
items.summary: Manchester City produced a dramatic late fightback to reach their fourth successive FA Cup final with a remarkable 2-1 win over Championship Southampton.

items.title: Eze downs Newcastle, sends Arsenal top of league
items.summary: Arsenal returned to the top of the Premier League after a 1-0 win against Newcastle on Saturday.

items.title: De Zerbi hopes win transforms Spurs mentality
items.summary: Roberto De Zerbi says Tottenham's 1-0 win at Wolves could be transformative for the club's fortunes despite more injuries.

items.title: Kane winner as Bayern Munich win from 3-0 down
items.summary: Harry Kane fired a late winner as Bayern Munich hit back from 3-0 down at Mainz to win 4-3 and extend their lead at the top of the table to 18 points.

items.title: VI Live: NEC uit het niets weer naast Twente
items.summary: FC Twente en NEC spelen zaterdagavond een cruciaal duel in de strijd om de Champions League-plekken. Verder wordt er ook volop gevoetbald in de Premier League, de FA Cup, de Bundesliga, La Liga, de Serie A en de Ligue 1. Blijf op de hoogte met de VI Live.

items.title: VI Live: Itakura valt in op voor hem onprettige positie, Holtby terug na beenwond
items.summary: Ajax gaat zaterdagavond om 20.00 uur op bezoek bij NAC Breda. De Amsterdammers mogen geen fout meer maken in de strijd om de tweede plek in de Eredivisie. Aan de andere kant heeft NAC de punten keihard nodig in de strijd tegen degradatie. Volg het duel op de voet in deze VI Live.

items.title: Lukkien ziet 'kansloos' FC Groningen in De Kuip: 'Onverklaarbaar'
items.summary: Dick Lukkien was na afloop van de nederlaag in De Kuip niet tevreden met zijn ploeg. De trainer van FC Groningen vond dat zijn spelers het Feyenoord wel heel makkelijk maakten.

items.title: Three goals, eight chaotic minutes - how day of relegation drama unfolded
items.summary: On a day of twists and turns, Tottenham and West Ham both picked up crucial wins in their fight to avoid relegation.

items.title: Man City beat Southampton to reach FA Cup final
items.summary: Manchester City score two goals in five minutes to secure a late comeback victory against Southampton and reach their fourth FA Cup final in a row.

items.title: Brugts belangrijk met assist in halve finale Champions League
items.summary: In dit blog volgen we alle ontwikkelingen in het vrouwenvoetbal. We besteden onder meer aandacht aan de Eurojackpot Vrouwen Eredivisie, de Europese toernooien en het Nederlands elftal.

items.title: PSG denkt alvast vooruit en wint ruim zonder het gouden aanvalstrio
items.summary: Ousmane Dembélé, Desiré Doué en Khvicha Kvaratskhelia hebben zich kunnen sparen bij de uitzege van Paris Saint-Germain op Angers zaterdagavond. Zonder de drie sterren zette PSG een halve week voor de eerste ontmoeting met Bayern München in de halve finale van de Champions League een volgende stap richting het winnen van de landstitel.

items.title: Arsenal edge back on top in title race after Eze stunner sees off Newcastle
items.summary: It has come down to a straight shootout, similar to five rounds of penalties, the equation plain yet loaded with complications. Score or miss. With Manchester City otherwise engaged in an FA Cup semi-final, it was Arsenal who took first. For them, the metaphorical walk to the spot, the moment of truth, began in the aftermath of last Sunday’s defeat at City. It was long and treacherous, the self-doubt gnawing away, the outside noise at fever pitch. Score or miss. With a draw very much into the latter category. Arsenal scored. Continue reading...

items.title: Manchester City pull off comeback win against Southampton to reach FA Cup final
items.summary: What a barnstorming finish to this FA Cup semi-final that featured three goals in eight minutes and ended with Nico González as the hero who swept Manchester City to a historic fourth consecutive final. The Spaniard’s winner came in the 87th minute. Bernardo Silva, only just introduced by Pep Guardiola, tapped to Jérémy Doku, who fed González. From outside Southampton’s area, to the left, the midfielder let go a rising, 30-yard shot that rocketed into the net and left Tonda Eckert’s team heartbroken, having taken the lead only moments before. Continue reading...

items.title: Kinsky's save, Palhinha's relief and - finally - a Tottenham win
items.summary: Tottenham end their long wait for a Premier League win with victory at Wolves - lifting their survival hopes in the process.

items.title: Has Salah played last Liverpool game? Slot says 'wait and see'
items.summary: Liverpool will have to "wait and see" whether Mohamed Salah has played his final game for the club, says manager Arne Slot.

items.title: João Palhinha keeps Spurs’ survival hopes alive with late winner at Wolves
items.summary: Roberto De Zerbi had said he wanted no crying in his camp, after Brighton scored their late equaliser last week. It was just as the Wolves fans had started chanting: “You’re going to cry in a minute,” that the substitute João Palhinha struck the goal that, briefly helping Tottenham climb out of the relegation zone, at least keeps them in the hunt for Premier League survival. West Ham’s late victory over Everton dropped Spurs back into 18th place but, in claiming his first win as Spurs manager, and the club’s first of 2026 in the league, De Zerbi has continued the team’s improvement. This fraught and low-quality victory means they avoided equalling the club record of 16 consecutive league games without a win, set in 1934-35. Continue reading...

items.title: Their day, until it wasn't - the title decider that had it all
items.summary: Two goals in stoppage time and pitch invasions by both sets of fans. The last day of the National League season lived up to its billing.

items.title: West Ham stay clear of drop zone after Wilson’s vital late winner against Everton
items.summary: Earlier in the season there would have been no coming back from such a crushing blow. It would have been the start of a vintage West Ham collapse. Another disappointment for the home support to absorb, another lead lost, another squandered advantage inching Nuno Espírito Santo’s side towards the Championship. Two minutes of the 90 remained when Vitalii Myolenko crossed, James Tarkowski won the first header and Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall lashed Everton level. Say farewell to the lifeline. Continue reading...

items.title: European football: Kane seals epic Bayern comeback as Barcelona surge towards title
items.summary: Bayern stun Mainz with four second-half goals Rashford strikes for Barcelona in win at Getafe Bayern Munich fought back from three goals down to clinch a 4-3 win over Mainz 05 as substitutes Harry Kane and Michael Olise led a second-half comeback for the Bundesliga champions. Dominik Kohr, Paul Nebel and Sheraldo Becker scored for Mainz in the first half while Bayern, who had made eight changes to the starting lineup that beat Bayer Leverkusen in Wednesday’s German Cup semi-final, had no shot on target until the break. The Bayern coach, Vincent Kompany, brought on Kane and Olise after the break and their renewed aggression paid off with Nicolas Jackson scoring in the 53rd minute and Olise finding the net 20 minutes later. Continue reading...

items.title: LIVE: Antwerp al na één helft klaar in 't Kuipke
items.summary: Zolang RC Genk met de punten blijft morsen in de Europe Play Offs, mag Westerlo blijven hopen om ook kans te maken op Europees voetbal volgend seizoen. Profiteren ze thuis tegen Antwerp?

items.title: 🎥 Casper Nielsen doet bekentenis na doelpunt tegen KRC Genk
items.summary: KRC Genk was op weg naar de overwinning tegen Standard. Maar dat was zonder Casper Nielsen gerekend die de Rouches in de slotminuut langszij bracht.

items.title: 🎥 Le but de la saison ? Un Diable Rouge humilie la défense de Carl Hoefkens d'un slalom complètement fou
items.summary: Mika Godts est décidément comme dans son jardin en Eredivisie. Il l'a encore prouvé ce soir contre le NAC Breda de Carl Hoefkens.

items.title: L'une des plus lourdes défaites de la carrière d'Edward Still : "Aussi étrange que ça puisse paraître..."
items.summary: Watford s'est incliné 5-1 à Middlesbrough. Edward Still déplore surtout la deuxième mi-temps des siens.

items.title: "Schandalig, geen greintje eergevoel": Felice Mazzù woedend na de nederlaag tegen Charleroi
items.summary: OH Leuven heeft een erg bleek optreden neergezet tegen Charleroi. Felice Mazzù spaarde zijn woorden niet in het interview na de match.

items.title: "Einde van een cyclus": verhaal van Club Brugge in Jupiler Pro League is voorbij
items.summary: Club Brugge moest vorig jaar de landstitel aan Union SG laten. Anthony Vanden Borre is overtuigd dat het ook dit seizoen zo zal uitdraaien, met een Club Brugge dat zichzelf opnieuw zal moeten uitvinden.

items.title: "C'était prévu" : Vincent Kompany lève le voile sur la folle remontada du Bayern
items.summary: Vincent Kompany est passé par toutes les émotions à Mayence. En conférence de presse, c'est son sourire qui prédominait.

items.title: 🎥 Au bout du suspense : Jérémy Doku porte Manchester City en finale de la FA Cup !
items.summary: Manchester City a dû puiser dans ses réserves pour venir à bout de Southampton en FA Cup. Jérémy Doku est à la base du réveil des Cityzens.

items.title: Opvallende transfer uit JPL voor Club Brugge? "Waarom zou hij daar niet passen?"
items.summary: De competities lopen op hun einde. Ondertussen zijn alle ploegen druk in de weer om een team voor volgend seizoen samen te stellen. En mogelijkheden, die zijn er genoeg, ook binnen de Jupiler Pro League.

items.title: Le Standard de Liège arrache un partage en fin de match contre le KRC Genk
items.summary: Le KRC Genk et le Standard de Liège se sont quittés dos à dos ce samedi sur le score de 1-1. Aaron Bibout pensait offrir la victoire aux siens, mais Casper Nielsen a arraché l'égalisation en fin de match.
